markdownRemark.html:
Awesome ESLint

A list of awesome ESLint configs, plugins, etc.

If you want to contribute, please read the contribution guidelines.

Contents

  • Configs
    • Configs by Well-Known Companies/Organizations
    • Other Prominent Configs (100 stars or so)
    • Other Configs
  • Preconfigured Configs with ESLint Set up
  • Plugins
    • Code Quality
    • Compatiblity
    • CSS in JS
    • Deprecation
    • Embedded

    • Languages
    • Libraries
    • Misc

    • Testing Tools
  • Parsers
  • Formatters
  • Globals

  • Tutorials

Configs

Configs by Well-Known Companies/Organizations

  • Airbnb - Shareable config for Airbnb's style guidestars108.7k.
  • Airbnb-babelstars2 - Airbnb's ESLint config with Babel Support.
  • Airbnb-typescriptstars525 - Airbnb's ESLint config with TypeScript support.
  • Alloystars2k - Progressive ESLint config for your React/Vue/TypeScript projects.
  • ESLint - Contains the ESLint configuration used for projects maintained by the ESLint team.
  • Facebook - Sharable config for Facebook's style guide.
  • Googlestars1.5k - Shareable config for the Google style.
  • React App - Sharable config for React projects.
  • Shopify - Shareable config for Shopify's style guidestars232.
  • Wikimediastars13 - Shareable config for Wikimedia's style guide, used by MediaWiki.

Other Prominent Configs (100 stars or so)

  • Autostars315 - Automatically configure ESLint based on your project's dependencies.
  • Canonicalstars128 - Shareable config for Canonical style guidestars15.
  • Standardstars2.1k - Shareable config for JavaScript Standard Stylestars25.5k.
  • XOstars189 - Shareable config for XOstars5.7k.

Other Configs

  • Adjunctstars32 - A reasonable collection of plugins to use alongside your main ESLint configuration.
  • Ash-Nazgstars5 - One config to rule them all!
  • Ceciliastars5 - ESLint configuration for awesome projects.
  • ESstars20 - Shareable config for very strict code.
  • Hardcorestars64 - The most strict (but practical) ESLint config out there.
  • Problemsstars59 - Shareable config that only catches actual problems, and doesn't enforce stylistic preferences.
  • Supermindstars4 - Shareable config for Supermind style.

Preconfigured Configs with ESLint Set up

  • Node.js Standard Stylestars5 - Node.js core config.
  • prettier-standardstars815 - Prettier formatter with custom eslint rules allowed.
  • Standardstars25.5k - JavaScript Standard Style.
  • Superlintstars3 - JavaScript Supermind Style.
  • XOstars5.7k - JavaScript happiness style linter ❤️.
  • Healthierstars67 - Code style agnostic version of Standard, perfect companion to Prettier.

Plugins

Code Quality

  • Radarstars27 - Rules detecting bugs and suspicious patterns (Fork of SonarJS).
  • SonarJSstars491 - Rules detecting bugs and suspicious patterns. See also a currently maintained fork, Radarstars27.
  • Unicornstars1.8k - Various awesome ESLint rules.

Compatiblity

  • Compatstars2.7k - Lint browser compatibility of APIs used (caniuse as an ESLint plugin).
  • ecmascript-compatstars21 - Disable ECMAScript language features not supported by your browserslist targets.
  • esstars51 - Disable specific ECMAScript language versions or individual features.
  • es5stars46 - ESLint plugin for ES5 users (forbid ES2015+ usage).
  • ie11stars13 - Detect unsupported ES6 features in IE11.

CSS in JS

  • CSS-modulesstars115 - Lint undefined or unused rules for css modules.
  • Emotion - ESLint rules for emotion.
  • Styled Components
    • Better Styled Componentsstars40 - Auto fixable ESlint's rules for styled components.
    • styled-components-a11ystars68 - A11y for Styled Components.

Deprecation

  • deprecatestars57 - Mark functions or modules as deprecated and get lint messages when they are used.
  • deprecationstars49 - Identifies use of jsdoc @deprecated functions.
  • disablestars48 - Disable specified plugins using file path patterns and inline comments.

Embedded

  • HTMLstars339 - Linting for JavaScript inside of HTML <script> tags.
  • Markdownstars250 - Linting for JavaScript inside of Markdown.

Frameworks

  • AngularJSstars609 - Linting rules to adhere to the John Papa's AngularJS Styleguidestars24.2k.
  • Backbonestars95 - Linting rules for Backbone.
  • Emberstars244 - Linting rules for Ember.
  • Hapistars22 - Linting rules for hapi.
  • Meteorstars118 - Meteor specific linting rules.
  • React
    • JSX a11ystars2.4k - Accessibility rules on JSX elements.
    • Reactstars7k - Linting rules for React and JSX.
    • React Hooks - Linting rules for React Hooks.
    • React Nativestars590 - React Native specific linting rules.
    • React-Reduxstars57 - React-Redux specific linting rules.
  • Sveltestars263 - Linting rules for Svelte v3 Components.
  • Vue
    • VueJSstars3.4k - Plugin for VueJS.
    • VueJS Scoped CSSstars42 - Plugin for Scoped CSS in VueJS.

Languages

  • Coffeestars10 - Enables linting CoffeeScript files with, with optional linting rules from the Coffeelint library.
  • ES5
    • Babelstars391 - Adds replacements for built-in rules to include Babel features.
    • importstars3.2k - Linting of ES2015+ import/export syntax, and prevent issues with misspelling of file paths and import names.
  • Flow
    • Flowstars1.1k - Flow type linting rules.
    • Flow Errorsstars405 - Run Flow as an ESLint plugin.
  • HTMLstars37 - ESLint plugin for HTML.
  • JSON
    • JSONstars124 - Lint your JSON files.
    • JSON, package.jsonstars20 - Lint, format, and auto-fix your JSON files. Sort your package.json.
    • JSON with Commentsstars27 - ESLint plugin for JSON, JSONC and JSON5.
    • JSON Schemastars10 - Validates data defined in JavaScript, JSON, YAML and TOML using JSON Schema Validator.
  • MDX - ESLint Parser/Plugin for MDX.
  • Nodestars758 - Additional ESLint's rules for Node.js.
  • SQLstars46 - SQL linting rules for ESLint.
  • TOMLstars2 - ESLint plugin for TOML.
  • TypeScript - Linting rules for TypeScript.
  • YAMLstars9 - ESLint plugin for YAML.

Libraries

  • GraphQL
    • dotansimha/graphql-eslintstars204 - Validates, prettifies and checks your GraphQL operations and GraphQL schema for best-practices.
    • apollostack/eslint-plugin-graphqlstars1.1k - Check your GraphQL query strings against a schema.
  • TypeGraphQLstars11 - Linting rules for TypeGraphQL, targeted at finding common mistakes.
  • jQuerystars17 - Linting rules for jQuery, including versioned configs for deprecated features.
  • JSDocstars538 - Linting rules for JSDoc comments (including the JavaScript within @example).
  • Lodash
    • Lodashstars210 - Lodash specific linting rules.
    • Lodash/fpstars140 - Lodash/fp specific linting rules.
    • Lodash templatestars12 - Plugin for Lodash template/Underscore template.
    • Microtemplatesstars4 (Used in Lodash and Underscore.js)
  • Mongodbstars14 - Mongodb native Node.js driver linting rules.
  • Ramdastars114 - Ramda specific linting rules.
  • RequireJSstars28 - Linting rules for RequireJS.

Misc

  • Diffstars11 - Run ESLint on your changed lines only. Also supports CI!
  • ESLint Commentsstars230 - Best practices about ESLint directive comments (/*eslint-disable*/, etc.).
  • eslint-plugin-write-good-commentsstars1 - Enforce good writing style in comments.
  • eslint-define-configstars14 - Provide a defineConfig function for .eslintrc.js files.
  • eslint-plugin-eslint-pluginstars91 - An ESLint plugin for linting ESLint plugins.
  • @mysticatea/eslint-pluginstars20 - Misc. rules.
  • Noticestars18 - An eslint rule that checks the top of files and fixes them too!
  • Only-Errorstars6 - Convert all rules to errors.
  • Only-Warnstars58 - Convert all rules to warnings.
  • PutOut - an ESLint plugin integrates putoutstars128 linter into ESLint.
  • TypeLintstars173 - Introduces types, based on existing schemas (Swagger, Redux) and linting access to object properties, preventing undefined errors.
  • Wokestars8 - Helps catch insensitive words, promoting an inclusive codebase.

Practices

  • array-funcstars52 - Avoid redundancy when using es2015 array methods and functions.
  • arrow functionsstars271 - ESLint rules to ensure proper arrow function definitions.
  • boundariesstars172 - Ensures that your architecture boundaries are respected by the elements in your project checking file structure and dependencies.
  • fpstars868 - ESLint rules for functional programming.
  • functionalstars306 - ESLint rules to disable mutation and promote fp in JavaScript and TypeScript.
  • Immutablestars881 - Disable all mutation in JavaScript.
  • new-with-errorstars20 - Require errors to be thrown using new.
  • no-constructor-bindstars7 - Encourages use of class properties by reporting use of this with bind or setting state in constructors.
  • no-inferred-method-namestars28 - Custom rule for ESLint that checks for inferred method names within object literals.
  • no-loopsstars86 - It's 2019 and you still use loops?
  • no-restricted-syntaxstars2 - Show queried syntax's content in messages.
  • no-use-extend-nativestars45 - Prevent using extended native objects.
  • Promisestars618 - Best practices when working with promises.
  • purestars23 - Enforce pure functions (without side effects).
  • RegExpstars74 - ESLint plugin for finding regexp mistakes and style guide violations.
  • sort-keys-fixstars49 - Adds fixer for ESLint sort-keys rule.
  • thisstars14 - Write pure functions, don't allow this.
  • toplevelstars8 - An eslint plugin for disallow side effect at module toplevel.

Performance

  • clean-regexstars283 - JavaScript regex linter that aims to help write better regular expressions by pointing out errors and suggesting improvements.
  • DOMstars9
  • Optimize Regexstars55 - Optimize regex literals.
  • Perf-Standard pluginstars18 and Configstars3

Security

  • no-secretsstars80 - An eslint plugin that detects potential secrets/credentials.
  • no-unsanitizedstars110 - Checks for innerHTML, outerHTML, etc.
  • piistars2 - Checks and enforces PII Compliance of the code. i.e. no email address, birth date, IP address or phone number in comments or string literals.
  • ScanJS configstars89 and pluginstars27 - Security-related rules.
  • Securitystars1.5k - ESLint rules for Node Security.
  • xssstars43 - Tries to detect XSS issues in codebase before they end up in production.

Style

  • const case - Enforce capitalization of constant primitive literals.
  • editorconfigstars7 - Derive rules from .editorconfig.
  • filenamesstars225 - Ensure consistent filenames for your JavaScript files.
  • Simple import sortstars553 - Easy autofixable import sorting.
  • Switch casestars11 - Switch-case-specific linting rules for ESLint.
  • paddingstars2 - Allows/disallows padding between statements.

Testing Tools

  • AVAstars215 - Linting rules for AVA.
  • Chai
    • expect practicesstars27
    • with unused expressionsstars43
    • permitted keywordsstars1
    • with chai-as-promised pluginstars2
    • globalsstars2
  • Cucumberstars3 - Linting rules for Cucumber.
  • Cypressstars411 - Linting rules for Cypress.
  • Jasminestars84 - Linting rules for Jasmine.
  • Jest
    • Enforcing practicesstars729 - Linting rules for Jest.
    • Enforcing consistent formattingstars81 - Formatting rules for Jest.
    • Jest-async - Async linting rule for Jest.
    • Jest-DOMstars188 - Linting rules for Jest-DOM.
  • Mocha
    • Enforcing practicesstars251 - Linting rules for Mocha.
    • Enforcing manageabilitystars9
  • QUnitstars22 - Linting rules for QUnit.
  • Testcafestars15 - Linting rules for Testcafe.
  • Testing Librarystars436 - Linting rules for Testing Library.

Parsers

  • Babelstars3k - Use Babel's parser for linting all Babel features.
  • TypeScriptstars9.5k - A TypeScript parser that produces output compatible with ESLint.
  • BrightScriptstars42 - BrightScript plugin for Roku development. Includes Parser and Rules.
  • GraphQLstars204 - Parser for the GraphQL AST. Includes parser, plugin, processor (for non-graphql files) and rules.

Formatters

  • badgerstars3 - Make SVG-based badges summarizing ESLint results (e.g., for use on a README).
  • git-logstars30 - ESLint Formatter featuring Git Author, Date, and Hash.
  • githubstars67 - See ESLint errors and warnings directly in pull requests.
  • gitlab - Output ESLint results in the GitLab code quality results.
  • mostars9 - Good-lookin' ESLint formatter and also for delightful reading experience.
  • summary-chartstars3 - Format ESLint output into a bar chart.

Globals

  • Restricted Globalsstars16 - Expect window qualifier on globals that may otherwise be confusable as local variables.
  • ES and browser globalsstars219 (originally from ESLint)
  • chai globalsstars2

Tools

  • es-file-traversestars2 - Obtain a list of only those files which are in use based on imports and/or requires from an entry file or files; list passable to ESLint. Intended esp. for linting 3rd party dependencies.
  • eslint-clistars56 - This is the eslint command that executes a local installed ESLint.
  • eslint-find-rulesstars157 - Find built-in ESLint rules you don't have in your custom config.
  • eslint-indexstars16 - CLI for finding and managing rules in ESLint config files.
  • eslint-multiplexerstars7 - Multiplex eslint results and merge results for common files.
  • eslint-nibblestars337 - Ease into ESLint, by fixing one rule at a time.
  • eslint-rule-documentationstars29 - Find the url for the documentation of an ESLint rule.
  • eslint-watchstars161 - Run ESLint with watch mode.
  • codacy-eslintstars5 - Docker used at Codacy to run ESLint.
  • esprintstars574 - Run ESLint across multiple threads.
  • generator-eslintstars113 - Generate ESLint plugin and rules with Yeoman.
  • editor-infostars2 - Detect whether one is within an editor/IDE and which type, allowing one to tweak ESLint configuration accordingly.

Developing for ESLint

  • eslint-docsstars3 - Keep your rule descriptions up-to-date across the repository.

Tutorials

  • Creating an ESLint Plugin - Article walking through the creation of an ESLint rule and plugin.
  • Lint Like It's 2015 - Article walking through the benefits of using ESLint.
  • Linting JavaScript with ESLint - Video showing ESLint setup and basics.
  • Linting React JSX with ESLint (in ES6) - Video showing how to use React and JSX with ESLint.
  • Plugin Module with Mixins - Article on how to write a plugin as a node module containing modular mixin configuration.
  • Writing a rule to spot undeclared props hiding in plain sight - Article about creating rules that require scope analysis.
